form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming fell at Auteuil in the G3 on March 1 over 3600m. Last start finished fourth in a small field at Auteuil in the G3 on March 22 over 3600m, on slow going 8 len behind Edamura carrying 63kg at $19. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation 4 of 9 runners at Auteuil in the G2 October 12 over 3600m, slow track; 17 len behind Leopard Du Berlais with 66kg at $45. Previous preparation first-up won by 2 len Clairefontaine August 27 over 3400m slow track defeating Duc De Roche carrying 67kg at $12. Should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Last outing settled back and ran on when finished seventh of 14 runners at Auteuil in the LR on March 14 over 3600m, on heavy track; 26 len behind No Limits Steve with 65kg at $14. Before that finished seventh of 12 starters at Auteuil in the LR on February 23 over 3600m, on heavy track; 52 len behind Boystone with 64.5kg at $15. Hard to have on recent efforts.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last run finished third of 14 runners at Auteuil in the LR on March 14 over 3600m, on heavy track; 4.5 len behind No Limits Steve with 69.5kg at $4.60. The start before that; finished second of 12 starters at Auteuil in the LR on February 23 over 3600m, in the wet; 3 len behind Boystone with 68.5kg at $12. Can measure up.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign 5 in a small field at Auteuil in the LR December 7 over 3600m, in the wet; 70 len behind Duc De Roche with 66kg at $25. Previously first up; 8 of 11 runners at Auteuil September 9 over 3500m, slow track; 41 len behind Nador carrying 67kg at $44. Others rate better this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4.5). First-up. Finished off last campaign 5 in a small field at Auteuil in the LR December 7 over 3600m, in the wet; 70 len behind Duc De Roche with 66kg at $25. Previously first up; 8 of 11 runners at Auteuil September 9 over 3500m, slow track; 41 len behind Nador carrying 67kg at $44. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign 8 of 16 runners at Auteuil December 7 over 3600m, on heavy track; 28 len behind Louminos carrying 71kg at $9.10. When resuming last campaign ran last at Auteuil in the LR September 9 over 3600m, slow track; 15 len behind Lotus Vert carrying 66kg at $20. Will struggle against these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7.5). Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign 8 of 16 runners at Auteuil December 7 over 3600m, on heavy track; 28 len behind Louminos carrying 71kg at $9.10. When resuming last campaign ran last at Auteuil in the LR September 9 over 3600m, slow track; 15 len behind Lotus Vert carrying 66kg at $20. Will struggle against these.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation 2 of 9 runners at Auteuil November 23 over 3500m, in the wet; behind Mamaland with 67kg at $9.80. First race start won by 0.5 len Saint Brieuc October 26 over 3600m defeating Ouno De L'abbaye with 64kg. This looks a nice race to kick off.
